item.title: Deduplicate backlog populate with cmd_groom flow
item.intent: backlog populate reuses the groom infrastructure instead of duplicating it. The cmd_backlog_populate function shrinks from 83 to ~40 lines by calling shared helpers.
item.description: cmd_backlog_populate (83 lines) duplicates the pattern from cmd_groom: acquire lock, load config, find context files, snapshot backlogs, run agent, protect items, enforce limits, print diff. Extract the shared groom/populate flow into a helper that both call with different agent name and context.
steps: Extract the common flow (lock, config, snapshot, run agent, protect, enforce limits, diff) into a shared helper function
cmd_groom calls the helper with agent=tech-lead or product-owner and standard context
cmd_backlog_populate calls the helper with agent=product-owner and PRODUCT.md context
Keep populate-specific logic: PRD file discovery, empty template guard
Verify: both groom and populate produce identical behavior
acceptanceCriteria: No duplicated snapshot/protect/enforce/diff code between groom and populate
